runs.responsePreview:
Excellent data. Now let me create a comprehensive cost comparison with three realistic agent loop scenarios and verification.

---

## **LLM Provider Comparison for Agent Loops: OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google Gemini**

**Ground Truth Reference:** {{fact:ground_truth:GEMINI_3}}

### **PRICING BASELINE (January 2026)**

| Provider | Model | Input Tokens | Output Tokens | Context Caching | Source |
|----------|-------|--------------|---------------|-----------------|--------|
| **OpenAI** | GPT-4o | $5 / 1M | $15 / 1M | Not applicable | openai.com |
| **Anthropic** | Claude 3.5 Sonnet | $3 / 1M | $15 / 1M | 90% discount available | platform.claude.com |
| **Google** | Gemini 3 Flash | $0.50 / 1M | $3 / 1M | 90% cost reduction (built-in) | blog.google |

---

### **THREE AGENT LOOP SCENARIOS**

#### **SCENARIO 1: High-Volume Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)**

runs.responsePreview:
DISCO deep dive (thesis + risks + comps + diligence + outbound version) within 3 tool calls and under $0.25. Ground-truth verified data is incorporated below with citations anchors.

Thesis
- DISCO Pharmaceuticals is a Cologne, Germany–based private company developing a surfaceome mapping platform to enable antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) programs. Lead programs are ADC candidates, with a focus on bispecific constructs for indications including SCLC and MSS-CRC. The company raised a Seed round of EUR 36M announced in 2025-12-11, positioning it in an early fundraising tranche with a focused preclinical/lead optimization path. HQ: Cologne, Germany; Founders: Roman Thomas; CEO: Mark Manfredi. Primary contact: info@discopharma.de. Freshness: 16 days old; within banker window; primary source requirement indicated. {{fact:ground_truth:DISCO}} 
- Platform and thesis implication: leveraging surfac
